case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. TOMMY CHAN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, TOMMY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2018
DECLARATION OF WAIVER OF POST JUDGMENT INTEREST AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 200040197) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION OF WAIVER OF POST JUDGMENT INTEREST AND COSTS (DECLARATIONS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210007279) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, TOMMY $19,808.10 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,103.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, TOMMY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036020), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A. SERVED JUN-29-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JUL-17-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, TOMMY
